column1: # srt-slurm pin registry (burn-down list — the goal is for this file to
# stay empty).
# Every multinode job resolves its srt-slurm checkout here. The standard
# pin is NVIDIA/srt-slurm @ main; a job only deviates when a row below
# matches it. SRT_SLURM_REPO / SRT_SLURM_REF environment overrides (e.g.
# from a config entry's additional-settings) beat this table.
# Columns (whitespace-separated, first match wins, shell globs allowed):
#   cluster  scenario(fixed|agentic)  framework  model-prefix  precision  repo  ref
# Example:
#   gb200  fixed  dynamo-vllm  dsv4  *  https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm.git  aflowers/vllm-gb200-v0.20.0
# --- Historical pins removed when the fleet standardized on main -----------
# These are kept as documentation and one-line rollbacks. If a family breaks
# on main, uncomment its row, file the upstream issue, and re-delete the row
# once fixed. Everything the agentic path needed from the cquil11 fork
# (--no-preflight, BenchmarkType.CUSTOM, benchmark-stage srun_options) has
# since merged into NVIDIA/srt-slurm main.
# *      *        *             *           *    https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm.git   sa-submission-q2-2026
# *      agentic  *             *           *    https://github.com/cquil11/srt-slurm-nv.git  cam/sa-submission-q2-2026
# gb200  agentic  *             dsv4        *    https://github.com/cquil11/srt-slurm-nv.git  de59739b172e507e15ebf145bfe305f606e82fbf
# gb300  agentic  *             dsv4        *    https://github.com/cquil11/srt-slurm-nv.git  6e34b8b83229634d732e41a4e2d6595f46ef60b5
# gb200  fixed    dynamo-vllm   dsv4        *    https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm.git   aflowers/vllm-gb200-v0.20.0
# gb300  fixed    dynamo-vllm   dsv4        *    https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm.git   aflowers/gb200-dsv4-recipes
# b300   fixed    dynamo-vllm   dsv4        *    https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm.git   aflowers/vllm-gb200-v0.20.0
# b200   fixed    dynamo-vllm   dsv4        *    https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm.git   aflowers/vllm-gb200-v0.20.0
